# Super Autotech

> Super Autotech is an Indian manufacturer of acoustic and automotive noise-control materials, established 2006. Flagship products are AcoustiLayer mass loaded vinyl (MLV) acoustic barrier and EVA heavy layer sheet, used for soundproofing in construction, automotive, HVAC and industrial noise control. The company supplies stock rolls, custom sizes and private-label material with fast lead times, shipping worldwide from India.

## Key facts

- Company: Super Autotech
- Founded: 2006 (about 20 years of manufacturing experience)
- Country: India (ships worldwide)
- Email: admin@superautotech.com
- Website: https://www.superautotech.com/
- Category: Acoustic materials, soundproofing, noise control, automotive NVH

## Products

- [Mass Loaded Vinyl Sheet (AcoustiLayer MLV)](https://www.superautotech.com/mass-loaded-vinyl.html): Dense, flexible limp-mass acoustic barrier at 2000 kg/m3. Blocks airborne noise in walls, ceilings, vehicles, ductwork and machinery. Thicknesses 2 mm, 3 mm, 4 mm, 5 mm. Black, water resistant, standard 5 m x 1 m rolls, custom sizes available.
- [EVA Heavy Layer Sheet](https://www.superautotech.com/eva-heavy-layer-sheet.html): Thermoformable high-density EVA acoustic barrier for automotive noise insulation. Heat-forms to floors, firewalls, doors and wheel arches. Thicknesses 2 mm, 3 mm, 4 mm, 5 mm. Black, custom sizes, lamination to foam or felt available.
- [All products](https://www.superautotech.com/products.html)

## Applications

- [Construction soundproofing](https://www.superautotech.com/construction-soundproofing.html): Walls, partitions, ceilings and floors.
- [Automotive soundproofing](https://www.superautotech.com/automotive-soundproofing.html): Vehicle cabins, floors, firewalls, doors, wheel arches.
- [HVAC and industrial](https://www.superautotech.com/applications.html): Duct lining, equipment enclosures, generator and machinery noise control.
- [MLV installation guide](https://www.superautotech.com/mlv-installation-guide.html): How to install mass loaded vinyl.

## Company

- [About Super Autotech](https://www.superautotech.com/about.html)
- [Contact and quotes](https://www.superautotech.com/contact.html): Request a quote or samples with your application, required thickness and volume.

## Common questions

- What is mass loaded vinyl (MLV)? A dense, flexible limp-mass barrier that blocks airborne noise. AcoustiLayer MLV is a high-density vinyl sheet at 2000 kg/m3.
- What thicknesses are available? 2 mm, 3 mm, 4 mm and 5 mm for both MLV and EVA heavy layer sheet.
- Where is it used? Wall and ceiling soundproofing, automotive cabins, acoustic fencing, HVAC duct lining, and machinery enclosures.
- How do I get a quote? Email admin@superautotech.com with your application, thickness and volume.
